title: Lil-Lets 100 Cotton Wool Balls
features: CERTIFIED ORGANIC COTTON - Made from 100% pure organic cotton, certified to GOTS (Global Organic Textile Standard) by the Soil Association. No synthetic pesticides, herbicides, genetically modified organisms (GMOs) or other harsh chemicals are used in the production of Lil-Lets Cotton Wool

GENTLE ON YOUR SKIN - Lil-Lets natural cotton wool balls are dermatologically tested, super soft and gentle, whilst also being strong and absorbent, making them ideal for all your beauty and family needs
LARGE COTTON BALLS - Our large cotton wool balls weigh 1g each, making them ultra absorbent and the perfect size for your everyday, beauty, cleaning, caring and medical needs
ETHICALLY SOURCED - Lil-Lets are committed to ensuring the safe and fair treatment of the people involved in making our cotton products. All our products are also vegan friendly and cruelty free

CHOOSE WHAT WORKS FOR YOU - At Lil-Lets, we understand that everybody is unique. That’s why we design personal care products that cater to your individual needs. With 70 years of experience, you can trust Lil-Lets for a gentle sustainable solution that cares for you and the planet
description: Product Description Lil-Lets fine cotton wool balls are soft, absorbent and crafted from 100% pure organic cotton. Dermatologically tested and gentle on your skin, they ensure our best care for your personal and beauty routines. Unlike most cotton wool balls, Lil-Let's cotton range is made with certified organic cotton by GOTS and the Soil Association. The Global Organic Textile standard is globally recognised and ensures that all the cotton used in this product meets strict organic standards. Our cotton is grown without the use of synthetic pesticides, herbicides, or genetically modified organisms (GMOs) and prohibits the use of potentially harmful chemicals during the manufacturing process, reflecting a commitment to organic farming practices. We can ensure fair and safe working conditions as well as compliance with environmental criteria that ensures transparency and traceability throughout the full supply chain, giving consumers confidence that by choosing Lil-Lets Cotton, you are being kind to the planet and to people. Each cotton ball weighs 1g, making then bigger than standard cotton wool balls, perfect for your cosmetic, first aid and arts and crafts needs. The 100 cotton balls are packaged conveniently in a drawstring bag, made from 30% recycled plastic, keeping them hygienic and dry, ready for use. Our Lil-Lets Cotton range also includes: cotton buds, cotton rounds, cotton ovals, cotton rolls, cotton pleats and a range of cotton for babies. Choose Lil-Lets cotton for a gentle, sustainable solution that cares for you and the planet. For more information about our products please visit our website Ingredients Cotton Directions For cosmetic use, gently apply to skin. After use, dispose of responsibly. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. Keep away from open flames. Dispose of responsibly. Manufacturer Contact Information Made for: Lil-Lets UK Ltd, PO Box 14568, Solihull, B91 9LN, United Kingdom. Lil-Lets EU, Unit 3D North Point House, New Mallow Road, Cork, T23 AT2P, Ireland.
